repair_candidate.summary: Repair #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare preferOver keep ownership of active channel config schemas deterministically and the Real behavior proof for #92884 passes.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair replacement channel schema ownership
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #92902 so replacement channel plugins that declare `preferOver` keep ownership of the active channel config schema deterministically.
- Preserve the intended behavior from @YonganZhang's source PR: plugin-owned replacement `channels.<id>` schema metadata should not be overwritten by later bundled metadata.
- Keep the patch focused to config metadata ordering and regression coverage unless the failing Real behavior proof identifies one minimal adjacent harness update.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884.
Source PR and credit: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902 by @YonganZhang.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts src/cli/config-cli.test.ts src/config/runtime-schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Rerun Real behavior proof for #92902
- `/review` before any merge recommendation
credit_notes: Preserve @YonganZhang attribution in the repaired PR branch, PR body update, and final merge notes.
Do not edit CHANGELOG.md directly for this normal PR; carry the user-facing release-note context in the PR body or squash message.

fix_actions.reason: fix artifact is too broad for autonomous execution; split into narrower jobs or explicitly set CLOWNFISH_ALLOW_BROAD_FIX_ARTIFACTS=1
